CustomField.description: Optional lookback used for Join-eligible codes only: the member's last active membership must be at least this many full months in the past for the code to apply. Blank = no lookback check. Reads Account.Last_Active_Membership_Date__c; null on Account = treated as never-active (passes the check).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Optional. Only meaningful for codes applicable to Join. Example: 12 means the code is valid only for members whose last active membership ended at least 12 months ago.
CustomField.label: Min Months Since Last Active
